response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform development; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief C++ exposure in early roles, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across multiple languages and domains.
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical mentoring through workshops and talks.
Proven ability to build and deploy scalable systems, including Kubernetes-based platforms and high-throughput services.
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years of C++ programming as required; C++ experience is minimal and outdated.
Lacks demonstrable experience in cloud compute platform architecture or distributed systems at scale.
No record of technical leadership in cloud or DevOps engineering teams, despite senior titles.
